title: pittosporum xanthanthum
intro: Pittosporum xanthanthum, also known as the yellow-flowered totara, is a small to medium-sized tree native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and acting as a natural remedy for colds and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Pittosporum xanthanthum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
